title: CheckMate
subtitle: AI-Powered News Analysis Tool. Awarded 1st place in the Cloud Native Experience Award hosted by Dell Technologies.
role: Software Developer (IS483 Final Year Group Project)
award: Cloud Native Experience Award - Dell Technologies

sections.title: Project Overview
sections.body: CheckMate is an AI-powered news analysis platform that helps users evaluate news sentiments, detect propaganda techniques, and understand article tones quickly through multiple intuitive interfaces.

highlights: Integrated 3 Hugging Face NLP models (sentiment, emotion, propaganda detection) into a scalable Python microservices backend with Kubernetes ingress routing for real-time ML inference.
Engineered a responsive, user-centric web platform using React, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Designed end-to-end UI/UX in Figma across Web Application, Chrome extension, and Telegram bot interfaces.
Validated product-market fit with 30 participants across institutions, achieving 0% drop-off and 80% satisfaction scores.
Led cross-functional requirements gathering and sprint planning for a 5-person team using Confluence, ensuring stakeholder alignment throughout development.
